# Nifty Nitesh Stock Market Training

> Welcome to the official informational resource for the Nifty Nitesh Stock Market Training 20-Day Live Program.

## About the Program
Nifty Nitesh offers a comprehensive 20-day live online training program designed to teach individuals everything they need to know about the stock market, trading, and investing. The program walks complete beginners through structured education, allowing them to finally achieve financial freedom through practical market knowledge. It caters to a varied audience including working professionals, college students, small business owners, homemakers, freelancers, and retired individuals looking to generate extra income or build wealth.

## Key Features
- **Format:** 20-day Live Online Training
- **Audience:** Everyone (Working Professionals, Students, Business Owners, Homemakers, Freelancers, Retirees)
- **Goal:** Teach stock market skills from scratch, encourage smarter financial decisions, and highlight pathways to consistent side income and smart investing.
- **Instructor:** Nifty Nitesh
- **Official Website:** [https://hero.niftynitesh.com](https://hero.niftynitesh.com)

## Contact Information
For enrollment and queries, users can reach out via WhatsApp through the main website.

## Disclaimer
All training content and knowledge are intended for educational purposes on financial markets and investing.
